headline: Jim Cramer on NIKE: “We Lost a Ton of Money in This”
summary: NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer highlighted selling the stock for the Charitable Trust. The Mad Money host commented: Did the stock of Nike deserve to run 5% on a beat quarter, with no raise, no […]

headline: Stock Market Week Ahead: Oil Hints At A Paradigm Shift
summary: The stock market trades largely sideways and oil dips to pre-Iran war prices heading into the final week before Q2 earnings. Here's what to watch.

headline: Nike’s self-inflicted wounds are risking CEO Elliott Hill’s nascent comeback
summary: The company is facing protracted trouble. The least it can do is get out of its own way.
